log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dwarf — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dwarf — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 56/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 56/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Dwarf — Bardic Musician --- HP: 56/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dwarf — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dwarf — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 37/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 24 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: -10/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
